namespace TestApp
{
    internal static class SparkCustomActionsBuilderExtensions
    {
        internal static global::MintPlayer.Spark.Abstractions.Builder.ISparkBuilder AddCustomActions(this global::MintPlayer.Spark.Abstractions.Builder.ISparkBuilder builder)
        {
            global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionServiceExtensions.AddScoped<global::TestApp.Actions.ExportAction>(builder.Services);
            return builder;
        }
    }
